details: Researching production SDPA masking of non-tile-aligned S_kv

Production SDPA nuked from tree, found in git a0c5eed609. Mask=-inf (bf16 0xFF80), additive add_block_inplace to QK before reduce, applied only to last kv chunk. from_torch tile pad defaults to 0.0f (py_to_tt_tensor.cpp:439)
Investigating production SDPA online-softmax rowsum handling; transformer/sdpa C++ op appears nuked from working tree, checking git history and other sdpa locations

Production SDPA (recovered from git c1d11e9f0c^): NO V-ones-column trick. Row-sum = packer L1-acc partial sum inside sub_exp_block_bcast_cols_inplace + finalize via matmul_reduce against cb_col_identity (column of ones). Reduce scaler cb_identity_scale_in only used for MAX reduce (reduce_c/reduce_block_max_row). Normalize: recip_block_inplace(sum) then mul_block_bcast_cols(O_accum, 1/l). Streaming path normalize_row_streaming = matmul_block(col_identity)+recip in DST[0] + mul_tiles_bcast_cols. No dedicated strided tile-column copy helper; copy_tile(cb,idx,dst) takes arbitrary index.
